parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ (() => { const body = $json.body || {}; const url = body.url || ""; const source = body.source || "auto"; const transcriber = body.transcriber || "assemblyai"; const gdrive_file_id = body.gdrive_file_id || ""; const callback_url = body.callback_url || ""; const word_boost = Array.isArray(body.word_boost) ? body.word_boost.filter(Boolean) : []; const directMediaPattern = /\.(mp3|wav|m4a|mp4|mov|webm)(\?|$)/i; const isDirectMediaUrl = directMediaPattern.test(url) || url.includes("supabase.co/storage") || url.includes("/api/tools/video-to-text/files/"); let detectedSource = source; if (source === "auto" && url) { if (url.includes("youtube.com") || url.includes("youtu.be")) { detectedSource = "youtube"; } else if (url.includes("drive.google.com")) { detectedSource = "gdrive"; } else if (isDirectMediaUrl) { detectedSource = "upload"; } else { detectedSource = "social"; } } if ((source === "social" || source === "upload" || source === "supabase") && isDirectMediaUrl) { detectedSource = "upload"; } if (gdrive_file_id) detectedSource = "gdrive"; return JSON.stringify({ url, source: detectedSource, transcriber, gdrive_file_id, callback_url, word_boost }); })() }}

nodes.name: Switch: Transcriber (YouTube)
nodes.notes: YouTube path: choose transcriber

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const url = $("Set: Extract & Detect Source").first().json.url; const match = url.match(new RegExp("(?:v=|youtu.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")); return "https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id=" + (match ? match[1] : ""); })() }}

nodes.name: RapidAPI: YouTube to MP3
nodes.notes: Gets direct MP3 download URL from YouTube via RapidAPI (500 free req/month). continueOnFail=true so errors flow to IF check.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_url: $("AssemblyAI: Upload YouTube Audio").first().json.upload_url, speech_models: ["universal-2"] }) }}

nodes.name: Whisper: Transcribe YouTube Audio
nodes.notes: Whisper-1: receives downloaded MP3 binary from RapidAPI download step. 25MB limit — avoid videos over ~20 min.

nodes.name: FastSaverAPI: Get Download URL
nodes.notes: Extract audio download URL from social media. continueOnFail=true so unsupported/expired URLs send error callback.

nodes.name: IF: FastSaverAPI OK?
nodes.notes: True → download URL exists. False → FastSaverAPI failed (unsupported platform, private video, expired URL).

nodes.name: Set: Format Error (FastSaverAPI)
nodes.notes: Formats FastSaverAPI error. Common causes: private video, unsupported platform, expired URL, quota exhausted.

nodes.name: Download Audio File
nodes.notes: Download the actual audio binary

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ (() => { const input = $("Set: Extract & Detect Source").first().json; const rawText = ($json.text || $json.transcription || "").trim(); const success = rawText.length > 0; return JSON.stringify({ success, transcription: rawText, source_url: input.url || "", source: input.source, transcriber: input.transcriber, word_count: success ? rawText.split(/\s+/).filter(w => w).length : 0, error: success ? "" : "No transcript text was detected from the selected source. Try clearer speech audio or switch transcriber.", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

parameters.content:
## [Video to Text] - Multi-Source Transcription - v1

**Trigger:** Webhook POST `/video-to-text`
**Sources:** YouTube (RapidAPI MP3), Social Media (FastSaverAPI), Google Drive
**Transcribers:** OpenAI Whisper | AssemblyAI | Deepgram Nova-2
**Output:** JSON result POSTed to callback_url

⚠️ **ASYNC API** — n8n runs in queue mode.
Every request returns {"message": "Workflow was started"} immediately.
Results are POSTed to callback_url when done.

### Request Body:
```json
{
  "url": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=xxx",
  "source": "auto",
  "transcriber": "assemblyai",
  "gdrive_file_id": "",
  "callback_url": "https://your-app.com/api/result"
}
```

### Callback Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "transcription": "Full text...",
  "source_url": "...",
  "source": "youtube",
  "transcriber": "assemblyai",
  "word_count": 1234,
  "timestamp": "..."
}
```

### API Key
`vtt_33872321dd87e4bd6275578fe674bf9102f7d4c96d4a62ee8ddbc54fc1368561`

## YouTube Path
**RapidAPI youtube-mp36 → AssemblyAI / Deepgram / Whisper**
1. Extract video ID from URL
2. GET https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id={videoId}
3. Returns { link: "https://...mp3" }
4. AssemblyAI: download binary → upload to AAI → poll
5. Deepgram: send MP3 URL directly → sync response
6. Whisper: DISABLED

⚠️ YouTube IPs are blocked from n8n VPS — must use RapidAPI
⚠️ RapidAPI temp URLs are IP-restricted — must download binary before sending to AssemblyAI

### Social Media Path
FastSaverAPI extracts audio from TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, etc.
Free tier: 200 points/month, 1 req/sec.

### Google Drive Path
Downloads file from Google Drive, then sends to chosen transcriber.

### AssemblyAI Polling (async)
Submit transcript → Code node 15s delay → Poll status
→ IF completed → continue, else → loop back

⚠️ Uses Code node for delay (NOT Wait node)
Wait node closes webhook connection — Code node does not.

Budget 60-120s per video.

### Output: Callback Only

IF callback_url provided → POST result JSON to callback_url
IF no callback_url → workflow ends silently

Result shape:
{
  success, transcription, source_url,
  source, transcriber, word_count, timestamp
}

No Google Docs — use callback_url in your web app.

nodes.name: Wait: Poll Delay (YouTube)
nodes.notes: Wait 15s before polling AssemblyAI

nodes.name: AssemblyAI: Poll Status (YouTube)
nodes.notes: Check if transcription is complete

nodes.name: IF: YouTube Transcript Complete?
nodes.notes: completed → Format Response, else → loop back

nodes.name: POST: Send Callback
nodes.notes: POST transcription result to caller callback_url

nodes.name: Download: YouTube MP3
nodes.notes: Download MP3 binary from RapidAPI temp URL

nodes.name: AssemblyAI: Upload YouTube Audio
nodes.notes: Upload MP3 binary to AssemblyAI — returns upload_url

nodes.name: Deepgram: Transcribe YouTube URL
nodes.notes: Deepgram Nova-2: transcribe binary MP3 downloaded by n8n VPS. Same pattern as AssemblyAI/Whisper — no CDN IP restriction issues.

nodes.name: Deepgram: Transcribe Audio
nodes.notes: Deepgram Nova-2: transcribe binary audio file

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ (() => { const alt = $json?.results?.channels?.[0]?.alternatives?.[0] || {}; const para = $json?.results?.channels?.[0]?.alternatives?.[0]?.paragraphs?.transcript || ""; const wordText = Array.isArray(alt.words) ? alt.words.map(w => w.punctuated_word || w.word || "").filter(Boolean).join(" ") : ""; const text = (alt.transcript || para || wordText || "").trim(); return JSON.stringify({ text, deepgram_raw_len: text.length }); })() }}

nodes.name: Set: Format Deepgram (YouTube)
nodes.notes: Extract transcript text from Deepgram response

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ (() => { const alt = $json?.results?.channels?.[0]?.alternatives?.[0] || {}; const para = $json?.results?.channels?.[0]?.alternatives?.[0]?.paragraphs?.transcript || ""; const wordText = Array.isArray(alt.words) ? alt.words.map(w => w.punctuated_word || w.word || "").filter(Boolean).join(" ") : ""; const text = (alt.transcript || para || wordText || "").trim(); return JSON.stringify({ text, deepgram_raw_len: text.length }); })() }}

nodes.name: Set: Format Deepgram (Social)
nodes.notes: Extract transcript text from Deepgram response

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const url = $("Set: Extract & Detect Source").first().json.url; const match = url.match(new RegExp("(?:v=|youtu.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")); return "https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id=" + (match ? match[1] : ""); })() }}

nodes.name: RapidAPI: YouTube to MP3 (Deepgram)
nodes.notes: Gets MP3 URL for Deepgram path. continueOnFail=true so errors flow to IF check.

nodes.name: IF: RapidAPI OK? (AssemblyAI)
nodes.notes: True → link exists, continue download. False → RapidAPI errored, send error callback.

nodes.name: IF: RapidAPI OK? (Deepgram)
nodes.notes: True → link exists, transcribe. False → RapidAPI errored, send error callback.

nodes.name: Set: Format Error (RapidAPI)
nodes.notes: Formats RapidAPI error payload. Includes error message, stage, API status, and original request context.

parameters.content:
### ⚠️ RapidAPI Error Handling

Both RapidAPI nodes have `continueOnFail: true`.
After each call, an IF node checks if `link` exists in the response.

**Success path:** `link` is present → continue to download/transcribe
**Error path:** `link` is missing (HTTP error OR soft error like `{status:"fail"}`) → `Set: Format Error (RapidAPI)` → callback to UI

**Error callback shape:**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "RapidAPI error message",
  "error_code": "RAPIDAPI_FETCH_FAILED",
  "error_stage": "youtube_download",
  "api_status": "fail",
  "http_status": 429,
  "source_url": "https://youtube.com/...",
  "transcriber": "assemblyai",
  "timestamp": "..."
}
```

Common causes: quota exhausted (500/month), invalid video ID, region-blocked video.

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const url = $("Set: Extract & Detect Source").first().json.url; const match = url.match(new RegExp("(?:v=|youtu.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")); return "https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id=" + (match ? match[1] : ""); })() }}

nodes.name: RapidAPI: YouTube to MP3 (Whisper)
nodes.notes: Gets MP3 URL for Whisper path. continueOnFail=true so errors flow to IF check.

nodes.name: IF: RapidAPI OK? (Whisper)
nodes.notes: True → link exists, download binary. False → RapidAPI errored, send error callback.

nodes.name: Download: YouTube MP3 (Whisper)
nodes.notes: Downloads MP3 binary from RapidAPI CDN URL. n8n VPS downloads it so Whisper receives a binary, not a URL.

nodes.name: IF: Whisper OK? (YouTube)
nodes.notes: True → text exists, format response. False → Whisper returned error, send error callback.

nodes.name: Download: YouTube MP3 (Deepgram)
nodes.notes: Downloads MP3 binary from RapidAPI CDN URL. n8n VPS downloads it so Deepgram receives binary — avoids IP-restriction issues.

nodes.name: IF: Deepgram OK? (YouTube)
nodes.notes: True → results exist, extract transcript. False → Deepgram returned error (e.g. REMOTE_CONTENT_ERROR from broken RapidAPI URL), send error callback.

nodes.name: Set: Format Error (Transcription)
nodes.notes: Formats transcription error payload. Covers Deepgram REMOTE_CONTENT_ERROR, AssemblyAI failures, Whisper rejections.

nodes.name: Switch: Transcriber (YouTube)
nodes.notes: YouTube path: choose transcriber

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const url = $("Set: Extract & Detect Source").first().json.url; const match = url.match(new RegExp("(?:v=|youtu.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")); return "https://youtube-mp36.p.rapidapi.com/dl?id=" + (match ? match[1] : ""); })() }}

nodes.name: RapidAPI: YouTube to MP3
nodes.notes: Gets direct MP3 download URL from YouTube via RapidAPI (500 free req/month). continueOnFail=true so errors flow to IF check.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_url: $("AssemblyAI: Upload YouTube Audio").first().json.upload_url, speech_models: ["universal-2"] }) }}

nodes.name: Whisper: Transcribe YouTube Audio
nodes.notes: Whisper-1: receives downloaded MP3 binary from RapidAPI download step. 25MB limit — avoid videos over ~20 min.

nodes.name: FastSaverAPI: Get Download URL
nodes.notes: Extract audio download URL from social media. continueOnFail=true so unsupported/expired URLs send error callback.

nodes.name: IF: FastSaverAPI OK?
nodes.notes: True → download URL exists. False → FastSaverAPI failed (unsupported platform, private video, expired URL).

nodes.name: Set: Format Error (FastSaverAPI)
nodes.notes: Formats FastSaverAPI error. Common causes: private video, unsupported platform, expired URL, quota exhausted.

nodes.name: Download Audio File
nodes.notes: Download the actual audio binary
